Build-Depends: architecture-is-64-bit, debhelper-compat (= 14), libhsa-runtime-dev [arm64 amd64 ppc64el], libucx-dev [amd64 arm64 loong64 riscv64 ppc64 ppc64el], libhsakmt-dev [arm64 amd64 ppc64el], libibverbs-dev, libpmix-dev, libnuma-dev [amd64 arm64 loong64 riscv64 ppc64 ppc64el s390x], librdmacm-dev, libibmad-dev, libibumad-dev, hipcc [amd64 arm64 ppc64el], clang-21, mpi-default-dev, mpi-default-bin, pkgconf, doxygen
